issues.detail: The skill only covers happy path scenarios and lacks error handling or edge case coverage.
Example includes hardcoded PostgreSQL credentials in the connection string.

scenarios.name: Register sklearn model and promote to production alias
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used mlflow.register_model with runs:/{run_id}/model URI and client.set_registered_model_alias for 'production', matching skill patterns; baseline used generic registry calls without aliases.

scenarios.name: Serve registered model and test endpoint
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used mlflow models serve -m models:/iris-classifier@production with curl POST to /invocations using {"inputs": [...]} payload; baseline used Flask wrapping instead of the native serve command.
